pens.name: Written in the Stars
pens.description: A little stardust, a little love note. This crystal pen was made for the dreamers, the romantics, and the ones who still believe in fate (and fabulous handwriting).

pens.name: Once Upon a Vine
pens.description: She writes in cursive. She signs with flair. She drinks her tea with a crystal stare. Draped in purple, a floral dream, With sparkle that demands a theme."Once Upon a Vine," she said with pride,"Why yes, I do romanticize my life."

pens.name: Vine and Dandy
pens.description: In a garden of gossip and glittery shade, Vine and Dandy made her grand parade. She wore white blooms with a crystal crown, And turned every scroll into royal renown.

pens.name: Espresso Yourself
pens.description: Loud and proud with every swirl, This pen's the vibe of that one cool girl. It says what it wants, writes how it feels, With bold retro fonts and zero chill.

pens.name: Mug Shot
pens.description: Caught in the act with a caffeinated stare, This pen's got secrets-and perfect hair. Swirls so smooth, it's criminally chic, With rose gold flair and mystery mystique.

pens.name: Honey Bunny
pens.description: A pen so pink, so sweet, so sunny, A pastel dream named Honey Bunny! With sparkles that gleam, Like a springtime daydream, You'll want one (or two... or twenty).

pens.name: Fox Trot
pens.description: Through woodland scenes, a fox takes flight, A pen that's swift, yet soft and light. With every twist, a tale unfolds-A hidden gem in rose gold clothes.

pens.name: Toile Me About It
pens.description: A story spun in blue and white, A pen that writes in pure delight. Gossip, lists, or dreamy lore, This toile-wrapped beauty does it all and more.

pens.name: Victorian Secret
pens.description: In candlelight where whispers flow, A pen as dark as tales untold. A velvet touch, a midnight hue, A secret's safe when penned by you.

pens.name: Clover Achiever
pens.description: This pen has a habit, so tricky, so sly, Of granting odd wishes-you never know why! A note for some milk? A cow's at your door! A letter of love? Now suitors galore! So handle with care, dear writer, be clever, Or you might just end up luckier than ever!

pens.name: Lucky Streak
pens.description: A writer who longed for some cheer, Picked up a green pen, crystal-clear. Each word that they wrote, Turned checks into notes-Now they own a yacht every year!

pens.name: Melanin Magic
pens.description: Tried to blend in? That's not my thing. My glow's too loud, my hues all sing. Gold hardware, crystals that gleam, Melanin Magic-living the dream. Chocolate, caramel, cinnamon spice- This pen's got flavor, and baby, it's nice.

pens.name: Crush
pens.description: She twirled the pen with a wistful sigh, Dreaming of love beneath twilight skies. Its ombré glow, like a sunset's blush, Turned scribbled thoughts into a quiet hush. Each word it wrote, her heart would rush, For this pen was her sweetest crush.

pens.name: Heartbeat
pens.description: The pen met the page with a fluttering start, Each word a rhythm, straight from the heart. It scribbled a sonnet, then paused for a beat, And doodled a heart that was perfectly sweet. With gems that sparkle and love that it charts, This pen writes life's most heartfelt parts.

pens.name: Second Date Set
pens.description: Three pens of passion, a sparkling team, Writing every love-filled dream. One for your crush, one for the heart, One for those feels that set you apart. With a box so sweet, there's no debate-This trio's made for your second date.

pens.name: Ice Storm
pens.description: The ice storm arrived with a grin,"Let's see where the fun can begin!"It slicked every street, Tripped over two feet, And chuckled, "Next round? Let's spin!"

pens.name: Wintery Mix
pens.description: Rain said, "I'll be the queen!"Snow smirked, "What a watery dream!"But sleet jumped in fast,"Let's mix up a blast, And make driving far more extreme!"

pens.name: Water Lily Pond
pens.description: A bridge arched high, a peaceful bow, The lilies below wore crowns of dew. The pond seemed to whisper, soft and slow,"Careful, or we'll paint you too!"

pens.name: Woman with a Parasol
pens.description: The canvas sighed as she walked by, A parasol twirling with flair, Her laughter rang out as a gust kissed the sky, And left her hair wild in the air.

pens.name: Crimson & Pine
pens.description: In a cabin of crimson and pine, A writer dreamed of a sign. She penned a sweet note, On parchment she'd tote,"Dear Santa, I've been mostly divine."But the elf who delivered her plea, Added: "She snitched a few cookies, you see."Santa chuckled and said with a wink,"That's why her stockings are red, don't you think?"

pens.name: Frosty Fellow
pens.description: There once was a pen called Frosty, Decked in penguins, oh so glossy. With a flick of its clip, It's the holiday tip, To write all your cards nice and bossy!

pens.name: Reindeer Games
pens.description: This pen called Reindeer Games, Writes letters with festive flames. Covered in deer, so merry and clear, It turns all your words into holiday cheer. Now, who says writing can't be fun and games?

pens.name: Snow Place Like Home
pens.description: There once was a pen with a glow, Wrapped in patterns that mimicked the snow. It wrote letters so sweet, In red, green, and sleet, Then cozied up by the fireplace-ho ho ho!

pens.name: Sweater Weather
pens.description: Put on your fluffiest socks, pour yourself some hot cocoa, and meet the coziest trio to ever grace your desk: the Sweater Weather Pen Set! ❄️ This festive box includes three merry little pens dressed to impress in winter's finest knit patterns-without a single itchy wool thread in sight. Inside, you'll find: There's Snow Place Like Home (Red) Frosty Fellow (Blue) Oh, Deer (Green) Each pen is topped with a white pearl gem to add some extra sparkle to your holiday to-do lists (or those heartfelt, last-minute greeting cards). And all three come packaged in a charming gift box that's ready to slip under the tree, into a stocking, or straight into your pen hoarding collection. ✨ This set is limited edition, so don't wait-grab yours before the snow melts!

pens.name: Fright Night
pens.description: Fright Night falls, the moon is high, Colors twinkle like the sky. With every swirl and every spin, The magic starts with just one pen.

pens.name: Cosmic Coffin
pens.description: In a coffin etched with stars so bright, The moon glows softly through the night. Galaxies swirl on its polished lid, Where cosmic secrets remain well hid.

pens.name: Feline Familiar
pens.description: On All Hallows' Eve, she prowls the night, A witch's cat, so dark and bright. With each soft step, the shadows creep, As ghosts and ghouls rise from their sleep.

pens.name: Pumpkin Poltergeist
pens.description: A poltergeist giggles, unseen in the air, With a pumpkin that hovers-beware! He carves it with glee, no knife in sight, As candles within flicker bright.

pens.name: Cinnamon Sky
pens.description: The cinnamon sky, autumn's grace, Watched brown leaves dance all over the place. They twirled, they drifted, with flair they fell, In a leafy waltz that cast a spell. The branches simply smiled in delight,"Autumn's costume ball, dressed in brown tonight."

pens.name: Apple of My Eye
pens.description: A pen in a ruby-red hue, With sparkles of gold peeking through. It dances on pages, Like stars on small stages, Writing love notes, just for you. With every soft swipe, a sweet reply, You'll see why it's the apple of my eye!

pens.name: Berry Nice
pens.description: Deep pink and blue, a striking pair, In the sky, they paint the air. With a wink and a nod, they play, Swapping colors, night and day. Berry nice? Oh, yes indeed! Their harmony's all you need.

pens.name: Vanilla Chai
pens.description: In a quaint little chai café, Vanilla danced in the steam's ballet, With a dash of spice, Oh, what a slice! Of heaven in every sway.

pens.name: Seasons Change
pens.description: Autumn leaves in gold took flight, Whirling and twirling in sheer delight. They plotted a game, A trick without shame, And hid all the paths from sight.

pens.name: First Light
pens.description: At the break of dawn, the shadows flee, As light sashays across the sea. It knocks on windows, fluffs the beds, Tucking away the stars' last threads. But then-with a wink, a sly surprise, Dawn plays dress-up before the skies, Donning a cloak of pastel hues, Splashing the world with drops of dew!

pens.name: Sunsetter
pens.description: In the court of the setting sun, The colors clash, the spectacle begun. Orange sued blue for stealing the light, But pink intervened with delight. As the judge, the sun set the tone, Laughing, "Let's paint the sky as our own!"With a flicker and flash, the case was done, The sky celebrated, the colors won!

pens.name: Chill Factor
pens.description: The sun was blazing, all bright and proud, When a chill factor whispered from a cloud. It danced through the trees with a breezy tune, Cooling down the afternoon. Ice cream sighed, "Now this is nice,"As the breeze turned heat into paradise. The chill factor winked, "I've got your back, Let's keep this summer on the right track!"

pens.name: Heat Wave
pens.description: The heat wave rolled in with a sunny grin, Turned every pool into a place to dive in. Popsicles raced against the clock, While flip-flops did their sidewalk walk. Laughter bubbled in the summer's glow, As the sun put on a dazzling show. The heat waved back with a wink and cheer,"Summer's here, the best time of the year!"

pens.name: Pitcher Perfect
pens.description: Under the shade of a tree so grand, A pitcher sat at a lemonade stand, Golden and pink, a blend so fine, Poured into glasses, sunshine in a line. But with each pour, to everyone's surprise, The lemonade sparkled like fireflies!

pens.name: Pink Lemonade
pens.description: In a stand of lemon delight, Where the sun kissed the day so bright, A little pink sip, so tangy and sweet, Danced on the tongue, oh, what a treat! But as the straw swirled in the cup, The lemons giggled, "Drink up, drink up!"

pens.name: Sea Spray
pens.description: A mermaid laughed on a moonlit night, Sea spray dancing in pure delight. She spun her tales with a flick of her tail, Of love and magic in every detail. And as dawn brought a gentle cue, She left a sparkle in the blue.

pens.name: Shore Thing
pens.description: By the ocean, under moonlight's gleam, A mermaid sang of a sailor's dream. She wrote in the sand, a magical fling,"Love at first sight? It's a shore thing!"

pens.name: Sprinkled Pink
pens.description: A donut in pink,with sprinkles galore, Dreamed of adventuresand so much more. It rolled through the bakery,past pies and tarts, Spreading joyand sweetening hearts. With a twinkle,it exclaimed with cheer,"I'll be a cupcakeby this time next year!"

pens.name: Dart and Dazzle
pens.description: Dragonfly dancer,aerial ace, Pirouetteswith effortless grace, A living jewelin summer's embrace, Wait-did itjust win first place? In the"Most Stylish Insect" race!

pens.name: Flight of Fancy
pens.description: On a leaf where the sunlight clings, A dragonfly wrote with its gossamer wings. It crafted each note, On a lily pad boat, Spreading joy as it springs. One morning so clear, It wrote, "Magic is near,"And with a twinkle bright, Turned the day into night!

pens.name: Twilight
pens.description: In the calm of twilight's song, A dragonfly's wings danced along. It painted the sky, With a gentle sigh, Turning dusk into a dreamscape strong. One night so serene, It wrote, "Enchantments unseen,"And with a flicker and gleam, Turned the night into a dream!

pens.name: All American
pens.description: In a meadow where eagles soar, Waved a flag loved even more, With stars shining bright, And stripes full of might, It stood as freedom's core. One day it fluttered high, Against a clear blue sky, A beacon of cheer, For all far and near, In a land where dreams never die.

pens.name: Fairy Godmother
pens.description: In a book of spells, quite extraordinary, Lived the silliest charms, so legendary!"Turn frogs to princes?" - That's so passé!"Make shoes tap-dance!" - That's the new way! Fairy Godmother giggled and gave it a try, Now the kingdom's footwear can can-can and fly!

pens.name: Reign Check
pens.description: A king with a crown, but no cash to his name, Said "I'll write you a check, it's all part of the game"But the jester just laughed, "Oh sire, don't be dense, A reign check's not legal, it makes no royal sense"So they danced in the courtyard, all penniless and free, For a kingdom of laughter needs no currency!

pens.name: Cherry Pie
pens.description: In the bakery's warm, cozy light, Cherry Pie played a tune every night, With a crust that could sing, And cherries that swing, It was truly a magical sight. But one day it hit a high note, And sprouted a tiny red boat, It sailed on the cream, Of a whipped topping dream, Turning pie into music afloat!

pens.name: Strawberry Shortcake
pens.description: Lady Shortcake loved her tea, With strawberries, three by three, She baked a sweet tart, A true work of art, Her guests were filled with glee. But one tiny cake had a wish, To swim like a strawberry fish, It splashed in the bowl, Gave everyone a roll, And was served as a splashy dish!

pens.name: Moonstruck
pens.description: Beneath the moon's silvery gleam, Lived Moonstruck, a pen of dreams. It wrote of stars and lunar beams, With whispers soft as twilight streams. One night it scribbled on a scroll, A secret tale of a midnight stroll. And lo, the moon winked with delight, As the pen turned wishes into golden light!

pens.name: Babygirl
pens.description: In a land of pillows,where pampering's a must, Lived Babygirl the princess,whose style was a fuss. She loved all things sparkly, but had a color scare-Pink or purple? Oh, royal despair! With a giggle and a twirl, her magic did unfold, Ombre pink to purple, her favorite colors, bold!

pens.name: Something Blue
pens.description: In a world of love and vows so true, Lived a pen named Something Blue. With a shimmering barrel, light and bright, And ombre crystals, pure delight. Clear Aurora and blue gems twinkled inside, A wedding theme in perfect stride. At its top, a crystal clear, A pen for moments held dear.

pens.name: Something Borrowed
pens.description: In a chapel so grand,where weddings delight, Lived Borrowed, the pen,in soft blue and white. With crystals that sparkle,and opal so true, It wrote "I do's"and a giggle or two. Each scribble brought joy,to the couple's big day, A keepsake of laughter,in the most charming way.

pens.name: Spoiled Rotten
pens.description: In a kingdom of sparkle, so grand and lush, Lived Princess Posh Penny, with a penchant to gush. She loved pink jewels, her purples so bright, But choosing just one? Oh, what a plight! One day a fairy, with a wink and a twist, Merged colors in harmony-what a sweet tryst! Now Penny beams, spoiled rotten in full!

pens.name: Cherry Cola
pens.description: Upon a carnival's merry carousel, Cherry and cola met, quite swell. He fizzed, she sparkled, In a dance, they were entangled. Their love, a flavor explosion, can you tell?

pens.name: Enchanted Forest
pens.description: In a dark junglewhere shadows play tricks, Lived an enchanted pen, full of magical tricks. Its barrel gleamed emerald, like leaves in the night, With indigo crystals, a mystical sight. This pen wrote in whispers, in moonlight's soft gleam, Turning scribbles to secrets, like a mystical dream.

pens.name: River's Edge
pens.description: In a shadowy jungle, where mysteries glide, Lived River's Edge, with colors that hide. Its indigo barrel, dark as the night, And emerald crystals, a shimmering sight. With every scribble, it whispered and gleamed, Turning notes into dreams, as wild as they seemed!

pens.name: Cream Puff
pens.description: Say hello to Cream Puff, the pen that's flipping the script on writing accessories with its creamy enamel barrel and a confetti of pastel crystals that are way too cute to ignore. It's like your favorite dessert, but make it fashion-and functional! Topped off with a honey-colored gem and snazzy gold accents, this little charmer is your perfect partner for penning down those brilliant thoughts, doodles, or dreamy plans. Cream Puff isn't just a tool; it's a vibe. Get this pastel powerhouse and sprinkle some fun on your notes!

pens.name: Cupcake Cutie
pens.description: Cupcake Cutie is going to make every other pen in your cup jealous. Wrapped in the glossiest pink enamel that's basically a wink in pen form, and speckled with pastel crystals like the top of your favorite sprinkle-topped treat, this pen is here to flirt with your paper and your ideas. Gold hardware? Check. A pink gem on top? Double check. Cupcake Cutie will make your writing as fun as a day spent baking cupcakes-minus the mess.

pens.name: Sunny Side Up
pens.description: In a land full of mornings,where sunshine's so bright, Lived a pen named Sunny,spreading cheer and delight. With its yellow barrel,like a sunbeam's embrace, And sparkling crystals,bringing smiles to your face. Sunny Side Up,with a magical glow, Turns doodles to daylight,wherever you go!

pens.name: Lavender Mint
pens.description: In a meadow of lavender and mint, Where colors whisper and glint, A pen of purple prideSailed the hues like a tide, Writing dreams with a magical tint. It crafted a tale of a breeze, That played in the leaves with ease, A secret nook in the shade, Where colors never fade, And stories float free in the tease.

pens.name: Country Club
pens.description: Step up to the tee with Country Club, the pen that's got more prep than a boarding school uniform. This snazzy stick sports a navy blue barrel that's as deep as an evening sky, trimmed in gold because, well, you're worth it. Topped with a sassy pink gem and a chamber of navy and pink crystals, it's the secret handshake of pens. Ready to jot down your next big idea or just look sharp in your pocket protector. Join the club-no collar required.

pens.name: Summer in the Hamptons
pens.description: Catch the breeze of Summer in the Hamptons, where preppy meets peppy in a crystal pen. This little rebel rocks a sparkling pink enamel barrel hugged by gold trim, making it the belle of the ball-or should we say, the country club? Topped with a navy gem and filled with navy and pink crystals, it's a yacht party in your pocket, a splash of summer fun ready to sail on a sea of pages. Grab it and write like the socialite you always wanted to be.

pens.name: Decadence
pens.description: Decadence is as rich and sultry as a midnight rendezvous. Cloaked in a deep purple aubergine, it's luxury, minus the snootiness. With rose gold hardware that gleams like the last rays of a sunset, this pen is not just an accessory; it's a statement. Inside is a swirl of brown, cream, and purple crystals, topped off with a light purple gem that winks at you like it knows all your secrets. It's the kind of pen that inspires you to write, doodle, or even draft your magnum opus on a whim. It writes smoothly and effortlessly, making your handwriting look like it belongs on a fancy invitation or a ransom note (just kidding, please don't use it for that).

pens.name: Electronica
pens.description: Are you tired of using boring, plain pens that make you feel like you're stuck in a black and white movie? Say hello to Electronica, the crystal pen that's like the VIP pass to the most exclusive nightclub in town. With its sleek silver hardware and rainbow chrome barrel, this pen doesn't just make an entrance; it owns the dance floor. Inside, a kaleidoscope of colorful crystals sparkles like a disco ball, captivating and utterly unique. And the crowning glory? A gorgeous purple gem on top, because more is more. This isn't just a pen; it's your ticket to writing in living color, lighting up your notebook like a Saturday night.

pens.name: Total Eclipse
pens.description: Turn the lights out on boring stationery with the Total Eclipse crystal pen. This isn't just a pen; it's a celestial event you hold in your hand. Its black matte barrel is the night sky, the stylized solar eclipse engraved on it is your personal cosmic phenomenon. Decked out with titanium hardware, it's got the strength of a space shuttle. But the real showstopper? A gradient blend of crystals in fiery red, vibrant orange, and sunny yellow, all culminating in a bright orange aurora gem that's like the sun's grand finale. This pen isn't just for writing; it's for proclaiming your style with the drama of the cosmos. With Total Eclipse in your grasp, every word you pen is a universe of its own, ready to eclipse any ordinary writing experience.

pens.name: Weather the Storm
pens.description: Meet our Weather the Storm crystal pen, your silver satin sidekick that will help you navigate through any brainstorm. It's a tempest of gray, purple, and mint crystals swirling inside, topped with a calm light purple gem that says, "Chill, we've got this." It's the perfect mix of moody skies and the promise of clear days ahead, making it the ultimate companion for plotting, planning, and penning your next big thing. Whether you're scribbling down your deepest thoughts or doodling away the dreariness, this pen is your reminder that after every storm, there's a rainbow waiting.

pens.name: Spring It On
pens.description: Hop right into the season with Spring it On," the crystal pen that's channeling Easter Sunday's best pastel vibes! It's barrel is dolled up with an Easter egg print that's a kaleidoscope of pastel pizzazz-think of the hippest eggs at the hunt. It's a sparkly salad of crystals in chill blues, sunshine yellows, soft oranges, and not-your-basic pink, making it the life of the desk party. Capped off with a light pink gem that's the icing on the cake, this pen struts in silver hardware that could outshine the Easter Bunny's bling. Whether jotting down a spring fling or penning your next big thing, let Spring it On be your sidekick for all things bright and beautiful.

pens.name: Everyone Loves an Irish Girl
pens.description: Everyone Loves an Irish Girl, a tribute pen that sparkles with the vibrant spirit of Ireland and the warmth of a legacy left behind. With its lush kelly green barrel, this pen is a nod to the emerald isles, with a lively mix of green, white, and orange crystals that dance with every word penned. Crowned with an orange gem and finished with gold hardware, it's more than just a writing tool; it's a symbol of pride, resilience, and love. Every purchase of this special edition pen fuels a heartfelt cause, directly supporting a family as they navigate through a time of loss. It's not just about making a statement on your desk; it's about penning a legacy of love and support. Write on, with heart and heritage.

pens.name: Breeze
pens.description: Breeze is the cool side of the pillow, in crystal pen form. With a barrel that fades from gray to sky blue, it's your personal chill pill when deadlines loom. The crystals inside? They're like a pair of sunglasses for your desk, cool and collected. And that blue aurora gem on top is the mood ring you never knew you needed, all wrapped up in silver hardware because we're fancy like that. Grab Breeze when you're ready to let your thoughts meander more than a lazy river.

pens.name: Ethereal
pens.description: Ethereal is your crystal pen ticket to the astral plane, no meditation required. With a barrel that shifts from dark blue to dark green, it's like holding a piece of the cosmos between your fingers. The mix of black and purple crystals inside are your personal constellation, guiding your way through brainstorming sessions. Topped with a color-shifting gem and black hardware, because even space explorers need to accessorize. Ethereal is for those moments you're daydreaming so hard, you might just levitate.

pens.name: Flame
pens.description: In a world of pens plain and tame, One dared to ignite and lay claim! With crystals ablaze, It set pages amaze, A fiery quill with a name -"The Flaming Pen" was its aim! No ink could resist its hot charm, As it singed every line with aplomb. But fear not, dear writer, stay calm, This pen brings pizzazz, not alarm!

pens.name: Ocean
pens.description: Ocean is not just a crystal pen; it's a mini-vacation. With a barrel that's a gradient of sea blues, it's like a cruise for your creativity. The blue crystals inside sparkle like sunlight on the water, without the sunburn. Capped with an aurora blue gem and dressed in silver hardware, Ocean is your go-to for when you're sailing through tasks, or just pretending you're on a yacht. It's all the vibes of the beach, with none of the sand in your shoes.

pens.name: Terra
pens.description: Terra wore green like a queen, Brown like she ruled every scene. But one day she tripped, oh my, And landed smack in a mud pie! She laughed and said with a grin so wide,"Now I'm earth from every side!"

pens.name: Just My Luck
pens.description: Step aside clovers and leprechauns, Just My Luck is the only charm you need this St. Patrick's Day. This isn't just a green pen; it's a pot of gold at the end of your rainbow of words, bedazzled with an ombre of gold to green crystals that outshines the Northern Lights. Our St. Patrick's Day special edition crystal pen is the bling that makes prose sing and signatures swing. Flaunt this gem in your meetings, and watch as colleagues' eyes go greener than your envy-inducing barrel. Whether you're jotting down notes or spinning tales, Just My Luck is the golden ticket to making your words as festive as the day itself. Grab yours and go write your luck!

pens.name: Box of Chocolates
pens.description: Nestled in a garden of cocoa delight, Lived a pen named Chocolates, a sweet sight. Its barrel adorned with truffles so neat, With crystals like sprinkles, sugary and sweet. It penned love notes with a creamy twist, And every word felt like a chocolate kiss. One day it giggled, "Oh, what a treat!"It wrote itself a recipe, simply to eat!

pens.name: Chocolate Covered Strawberries
pens.description: A strawberry sweet in a chocolate coat, Sailed on a berry small boat. It dreamed of a life, so rich and grand, In a dessert wonderland. But a nibble here, a nibble there, It vanished into thin air! The twist? It found fame, In a tummy, it gained acclaim!

pens.name: Conversation Hearts
pens.description: Say hello to Conversation Hearts, the crystal pen that's sweeter than your grandma's peach cobbler and cooler than the other side of the pillow. This isn't just a pen; it's a confetti cannon of cuteness ready to parade your pages with pastel prose. With its barrel wrapped in a charming chat of pastel hearts, it's like Valentine's Day without the heartache and way more fun. Inside, find a treasure trove of aurora and pastel crystals making every turn kaleidoscope of "ooh's" and "ahh's." Capped with an Aurora gem that winks at you with every thought penned, and boasting silver hardware that's the icing on the cake, this candy pen from our Confectionery collection is the main character in the story of your desk. It's not just cute; it's "hold my calls" levels of adorable.

pens.name: Fairy Dust
pens.description: In a forest where fairies take flight, Lived a dust that would shimmer at night. With rose gold sparkles so bright, It turned dull days into pure delight.

pens.name: Fifth Avenue
pens.description: Miss Crystal Pen was a sight, Dazzling Fifth Avenue day and night. She sparkled and shined, A true gem, one-of-a-kind! At galas she'd make a big splash, While signing big checks with panache. But don't be misled by her flash, As Crystal prefers checks over cash! For a pen of her stature and class, Handling money would simply be crass.

pens.name: Haunted Mansion
pens.description: Embrace the ethereal with our Haunted Mansion crystal pen, where darkly dazzling design meets ghostly glamour! Striking black chrome metal sets the stage for a spine-chilling yet enchanting print of a haunted mansion, electrically illuminated by a stark lightning bolt. Swirl into a mystic night with crystals cascading in a spectral blend of blue, black, and clear, crowned by a hauntingly beautiful blue gem on top. Designed to enchant every stroke and spook every word, this pen is not just a writing instrument, but a ticket to a realm where every jot is a jot through the jovial juncture of the jazzy and the mysterious. Beware: your words might just get thrillingly possessed by an otherworldly elegance!

pens.name: Golden Hour
pens.description: Meet Golden Hour, the pen that embraces the cozy, earthy vibes of autumn. This pen is like a warm hug from your favorite sweater. Its golden "glassed" barrel glows with the colors of a sunset, giving you that comfy feeling of wrapping up in a blanket as the day winds down.

pens.name: Plum Perfect
pens.description: In a world of ink and dreams, Lived a pen with plum-like gleams. It wrote of stars and moonlit nights, Of secret loves and daring flights. But one day, with a flourish grand, It penned a tale of a talking hand!"Write on," it said, "with flair and fun, For with this pen, the magic's just begun!"

pens.name: Specter
pens.description: Introducing Specter, a bewitching limited edition pen just in time for Halloween. With its sparkling black barrel, adorned with a captivating blend of crystals in eerie purples and haunting greens, and crowned with an aurora gem, Specter embodies the spirit of the season. More than just a pen, it's a portal to the supernatural, perfect for jotting down ghostly tales or adding an enchanting touch to your everyday writing. Embrace the magic of Halloween with Specter by your side, and let your creativity soar in the PenGems way!

pens.name: Bavarian Beauty
pens.description: In a Bavarian village, so merry and bright, Lived a pen named Beauty, in blue and white. With crystals that twinkled, a dazzling view, It scribbled pure magic in shades of true blue. A touch of Bavaria in every swirl, This pen was a gem, beloved by each girl.

pens.name: Biergarten Bling
pens.description: In a land of pretzelsand cheers so grand, Lived Biergarten Bling,in a festive band. Its barrel was golden,like ale so bright, And crystals that sparkled in the Bavarian night. It doodled bratwursts, and mugs raised high, Turning notes into cheers, oh my!

pens.name: Edelweiss
pens.description: In a land of snow and flowers, Where the mountains touched the sky, Lived a pen named Edelweiss, With a twinkle in its eye. Its body, a canvas of blue and green, With petals of purest white, A symbol of courage and beauty, In the alpine sunlight. Edelweiss danced across the page, Leaving trails of joy and grace, A faithful friend to all who wrote, With a smile upon their face.

pens.name: Little Lederhose
pens.description: Little Lederhose, with flair and grace, Joined the fest in a lively place. Sausages and pretzels, oh so grand, Turned into a polka band. With every note, the crowd would cheer, For a pen that brought the magic near."Prost!" it laughed, with a wink and spin, At Oktoberfest, the fun begins!

pens.name: Supermoon
pens.description: A pen of moonlit silver hue, Wrote tales that were too good to be true. It crafted a night, bright and grand, Where stars and dreams danced hand in hand. But with a flick and a flourish, so clear, The moon turned into a shimmering sphere!"Dreamscape," it laughed with glee,"Where magic's as wild as can be!"

pens.name: Flashback
pens.description: Step into the mesmerizing world of Flashback, the ultimate showstopper from our Neon Lights collection! With an ombre pink to purple to blue barrel with a sassy black paint splash print, this pen is a vibrant party on paper! The bright pink, purple, blue, and black crystals come together like a disco dance, adding a burst of electrifying energy to your writing experience. Our fabulous matching gem on top is the shining star of this cosmic show. Make your words pop and sizzle with Flashback, because life is too short for dull writing. Light up your ideas and let your creativity shine like a neon supernova.

pens.name: Lime Light
pens.description: In a garden of lights so bright, Lime Light danced through the night. A green so vibrant, it caused quite a scene, Even the stars turned envious green. But then with a wink and a gleam in its eye, It scribbled a note to the moon in the sky."Let's swap places," it boldly declared, And the moon agreed, quite unprepared!

pens.name: Nightlife
pens.description: In a city that never sleeps, Where neon lights and magic creeps, A crystal pen, so bright and bold, Writes tales of nights, both new and old. But with a flick, it starts to glow, And suddenly, the words just flow. A disco ball, it spins and beams, Turning scribbles into dreams!

pens.name: Pure Energy
pens.description: In the 80s, where neon lights reigned, This pen rocked tunes, electric and famed. It scribbled out synth beats, with every jot, Creating dance floors, on the spot. But one night, in a funky twist, It wrote itself into a disco fist! Boom, pow, lights did ignite, Pure energy groovin' all night.

pens.name: Caramel Butter Pecan
pens.description: Indulge your senses with our delectable Caramel Butter Pecan crystal pen. With a glossy caramel barrel that's as smooth as butter, this pen is a treat for your fingertips. You'll be whisked away on a flavorful adventure with its glossy caramel barrel and luscious gold hardware. This pen is a true treat for the senses, boasting a delectable blend of vanilla, caramel, and pecan crystals that dance and dazzle with every stroke. And let's not forget the pièce de résistance-a matching caramel gem that sits on top. Caramel Butter Pecan is not only a pen, but a mouthwatering reward. With any purchase of $40 or more, this delectable delight becomes a delicious gift. Treat yourself or surprise a friend with this decadent pen, and let the flavors of Caramel Butter Pecan elevate your writing experience to new heights of deliciousness!

pens.name: Spot On
pens.description: In a land where dots did play, A merry dance in bright array. They twirled and spun in vibrant glee, Creating patterns wild and free. But one dot, with a cheeky grin, Became a moon, lighting within! Stars and laughter filled the night, Polka dot dreams took flight.

pens.name: Americana
pens.description: In a land of red, white, and blue, Where dreams and fireworks flew, Lived a pen with a sparkly grin, Writing tales with a patriotic spin.

pens.name: Military Mental Health Awareness
pens.description: This pen, as brave and bold as the heroes it honors, features a green camouflage design and a poignant green ribbon - the universal symbol of mental health awareness. Its black matte hardware and blend of black and green crystals emulate the resilience and strength of our military personnel and veterans.

pens.name: Always be a Unicorn
pens.description: Imagine you're a mythical creature with Always be a Unicorn, the most magical member of our Highland Meadow Collection. This pen is as unique and enchanting as the creature it embodies, featuring a white barrel adorned with a majestic unicorn sporting rainbow hair and a riot of bright color splatters - a technicolor tribute to the wild beauty of the Scottish Highlands! Its blend of matching crystals shimmers like a sprinkle of pixie dust, while the aurora gem crowns the pen with all the allure of a unicorn's horn. Available in your choice of gold, rose, or silver hardware, Always be a Unicorn is the pen that reminds you to always be yourself, unless you can be a unicorn, then always be a unicorn.

pens.name: Doe a Deer
pens.description: Introducing Doe a Deer, a captivating member of our Highland Meadow collection that's as enchanting as a Scottish fairy tale! With a white barrel graced by a watercolor portrait of a gentle Scottish deer, this pen is your ticket to the magical highlands. Its blend of matching crystals sparkle like fairy dust scattered across the heather, while the mesmerizing aurora gem perches atop the pen like a beacon guiding you through the misty moors. Available in silver, gold, or rose gold hardware, Doe a Deer is the pen that turns every scribble into a charming highland adventure. With Doe a Deer, your words will prance and leap with the grace of its namesake!

pens.name: Elspeth Pixie Dust
pens.description: Meet Elspeth, the whimsical Pixie Dust pen from our Highland Meadow Collection. This is no ordinary pen; Elspeth brings to your desk a piece of the magical Scottish Highlands, its white barrel adorned with a watercolor winged fairy wearing a flowing green dress. The pen's blend of matching crystals twinkle with all the mischief and magic of a pixie's laughter, while the enchanting aurora gem on top gleams like a highland moonbeam. Whether you prefer Silver, Gold, or Rosegold, Elspeth is ready to flit and flutter her way into your collection, transforming every scribble into a spellbinding story. With Elspeth, let the fairy tales unfold as your pen glides across the page!

pens.name: Freya Pixie Dust
pens.description: Say hello to Freya,a bewitching Pixie Dust pen from our Highland Meadow Collection. Dressed in a delicate white dress, surrounded by watercolor blooming flowers, Freya brings the ethereal beauty of the Scottish Highlands right to your fingertips. The pen's blend of matching crystals shimmers like the morning dew on a highland bloom, while the aurora gem atop radiates with the mystique of a pixie's charm. Available in your choice of silver, gold, or rose gold hardware, Freya lets you pen your tales with a dash of magic, making every word you write a whisper in the wind, a petal on the flower, a secret in the Highland meadow. With Freya, you'll write not just notes, but enchantments.

pens.name: Gaelic Garden
pens.description: Step into a picturesque Scottish bloom with Gaelic Garden, an enchanting addition to our Highland Meadow collection. With a white barrel adorned with watercolor flowers, this pen exudes the charm of a whimsical highland spring. The matching crystals shimmer like dewdrops clinging to wild thistles, while the captivating aurora gem crowns the pen like a highland sunrise. Best of all, the "Gaelic Garden" pen caters to your preference, offering a choice of silver, gold, or rose gold hardware - because in our Gaelic Garden, every scribe is a monarch! Unleash your inner bard with the "Gaelic Garden" pen and let your words bloom with Scottish charm!

pens.name: Kenna Pixie Dust
pens.description: Introducing Kenna, your whimsical Pixie Dust writing companion from the Highland Meadow collection. Like a sprite from a Scottish fairy-tale, Kenna's white barrel features a captivating watercolor fairy dressed in white and sporting a hat of resplendent flowers. Its blend of matching crystals shine with the allure of a fairy's magical touch, and an enchanting aurora gem sits on top, reminiscent of a star in the Highland's twilight sky. Available in silver, gold, or rose gold hardware, Kenna is not just a pen; it's a ticket to a world where magic thrives and every word you write is a spell. With Kenna, you'll pen tales as mesmerizing as the fairy whispers in a Highland meadow!

pens.name: Bonnie Coo
pens.description: Get ready to add some whimsical flair to your writing with the Bonnie Coo pen from the Highland Meadow Collection! Featuring a white barrel adorned with a watercolor Highland cow surrounded by flowers, this pen is like a mini escape to a magical Scottish meadow. And let's not forget the blend of peach, clear, and light pink crystals, the light pink gem on top, and the rose gold hardware - they're like a disco party for your pen collection! Plus, with smooth ink and sturdy hardware, this pen is as practical as it is pretty. So why settle for a boring pen when you can have one that's both charming and classy? Order your Bonnie Coo pen today and let the writing magic begin!

pens.name: Gnome de Plume
pens.description: Introducing the fantastical Gnome de Plume pen by PenGems, an enchanting writing companion straight from the Scottish Highlands! Let your creativity bloom with this charming pen, featuring a delightful watercolor gnome nestled amidst vibrant flowers. A symphony of sparkling matching crystals and sophisticated silver metal will make your writing dance a Highland jig! Topped off with a mesmerizing light blue gem, this captivating pen is no garden-variety writing instrument. Unleash your inner bard and let the "Gnome de Plume" pen whisk you away to a world of penmanship frolics and poetic puns. So, don't just gnome around, add this magical marvel to your PenGems collection today, and write your own legendary tale with a twist of Scottish charm!

pens.name: Highland Blooms
pens.description: Introducing the Highland Blooms pen from the Highland Meadow Collection - the perfect writing instrument for those moments when you need a little creative inspiration. With a white barrel featuring watercolor flowers, this pen is like a mini escape to a meadow on a sunny day. And if that's not enough to brighten your day, we've added a blend of peach, clear, and light purple crystals, plus a light purple gem on top, for some extra bling. But don't let the glamour fool you - this pen is also practical, with smooth writing ink and sturdy silver hardware. So whether you're penning a sonnet or a grocery list, the Highland Blooms pen is sure to be your new creative muse. Order yours today and let the inspiration flow!

pens.name: Shetland Spring
pens.description: Introducing the Shetland Spring pen from the Highland Meadow Collection - the perfect writing instrument for those moments when you need a little bit of cute and a little bit of bling. With a white barrel featuring a watercolor Shetland pony surrounded by flowers, this pen is like a tiny escape to a whimsical Scottish meadow. And if that's not enough to make you smile, we've added a blend of peach, clear, and light green crystals, plus a light green gem on top, for some extra sparkle. But don't let all the charm fool you - this pen also writes like a dream and has pretty gold hardware. So whether you're penning a novel or just jotting down a grocery list, the Shetland Spring pen is sure to make your writing experience a little bit brighter. So why settle for a boring pen when you can have one that's as cute and sassy as a Shetland pony with a sense of humor? Order your Shetland Spring pen today and get ready to add some whimsy to your writing game!

pens.name: Far Out
pens.description: A pen named Far Out, quite groovy, Wrote tales that were far from a movie. It scribbled peace signs and flowers, In psychedelic, magical hours. But one day it wrote with a twist,"Hey man, your notes can't be missed!"It turned into a tie-dye delight, Far Out, making writing a flight!

pens.name: Feelin' Groovy
pens.description: Introducing Feelin' Groovy, the psychedelic crystal pen from our Trippie Hippie collection that will have you writing in technicolor! This far-out pen features a solid pink barrel with the words "Feelin' Groovy" and a single, smiling flower - a delightful duo spreading good vibes with every flourish. The grooviest part? The blend of pink and yellow crystals in the barrel, like a dazzling disco ball straight out of Woodstock. And let's not forget the radiant pink gem on top, winking at you like a mischievous moonbeam. With the "Feelin' Groovy" pen in hand, your writing will be infused with peace, love, and happiness!

pens.name: Flower Power
pens.description: Introducing Flower Power, the vibrant crystal pen from our Trippie Hippie collection that will infuse your writing with the groovy spirit of the 70s! This sunshine-yellow pen is adorned with a retro print of flowers in white, orange, green, and red, reminiscent of the carefree days of love-ins and daisy chains. To keep the good vibes flowing, the pen has a captivating blend of orange and yellow crystals, sparkling like the first rays of sunrise on the summer solstice. And as the cherry on top, a radiant yellow gem glistens like a drop of pure sunshine, bringing warmth and joy to every word you write. With the Flower Power pen in hand, you can channel your inner hippie, and let your creativity bloom like a field of wildflowers!

pens.name: Sassy Grass
pens.description: Introducing Sassy Grass, the dazzling crystal pen from our Trippie Hippie collection that'll make you want to boogie down! This statement-maker features a sparkling avocado green barrel that's as eye-catching as a groovy disco ball, while the goldtone metal hardware will make you feel like a 70s superstar. The pen's true magic lies in its enchanting blend of ivory, brown, green, and gold crystals, which shimmer and sparkle like a treasure trove of vintage gems unearthed at a bohemian boutique. As part of the Trippie Hippie Collection, Sassy Grass brings the essence of the 70s to life, inspiring you to unleash your creativity with flair and funk. Grab this pen, let your inner hippie shine, and let Sassy Grass be your muse as you create your own kaleidoscope of groovy stories!

pens.name: Leave Them Speechless
pens.description: Introducing Leave Them Speechless, the pink, purple, and rose gold crystal pen that's so breathtaking, it'll leave even the sassiest of unicorns weak in the knees! This fabulous writing wonder boasts a mesmerizing pink and purple ombre barrel, like a cotton candy dream that makes you want to dip your fingers in and taste the magic. The sparkling ombre crystals gleam like the disco ball at a fairy prom, while the luxe rose gold hardware adds that extra sprinkle of pizzazz. And the pièce de résistance? A jaw-dropping purple gem on top that would make Prince himself sing your praises. So, write with a flourish, weave stories that rival the charm of a Cheshire Cat's grin, and let Speechless take you on a whirlwind adventure where words come to life and dance off the page.

pens.name: Bunningham Palace
pens.description: Introducing the adorable Bunningham Palace crystal pen! This limited-edition gem boasts a cute cartoon-style pink castle on the barrel, enhanced by elegant rose gold hardware. As part of the delightful Pillow Loves Lilibet collection, it sparkles with a captivating blend of aurora and pink crystals inside and an aurora gem on top. Add a touch of fairytale magic to your writing adventures with the charming and enchanting Bunningham Palace pen!

pens.name: Lady Blushington
pens.description: Lady Blushington, chic and fine, Her pen in rose gold, truly divine. Wrote whispers in pink, With a coy little wink, And tales that would twist and twine. At a masquerade, quite unseen, She doodled, her strokes keen. A secret note passed, In jest, it was cast, Now who could that beau have been?

pens.name: Prince Pillow
pens.description: Prince Pillow, oh so plush, Donned a pen with royal hush. In letters soft as bunny fur, He scribbled notes that caused a stir. But one spring day, amidst the bloom, He wrote himself a bunny groom! Lilibet laughed, a joyful tune, They hopped together 'neath the moon.

pens.name: Princess Lilibet
pens.description: Princess Lilibet, sweet and neat, Had a pen with a magical feat. Each word she wrote, with gentle cheer, Bloomed into flowers, far and near. But on Easter, with a bunny hop, The pen's ink turned to chocolate drops! Delight and wonder in every jot, Easter magic in every dot.

pens.name: Cherry Blossom
pens.description: The Cherry Blossom pen is a sweet little piece of luxury! It has a delicate pink cherry blossom design on a white enamel barrel, and over 2000 petite pink Czech aurora glass crystals twinkle like sunshine on a spring day. And that aurora gem on the top? It's like the cherry on top of a perfect springtime sundae. Whether you're signing a birthday card, making a to-do list, or doodling in a notebook, this pen will add a touch of glamour to every word you write. So go ahead and treat yourself to a little bit of pretty - you deserve it!

pens.name: Starry Night
pens.description: Starry Night is a stunning, one-of-a-kind crystal pen that's sure to impress. The barrel of the pen has a raised texture interpretation of Vincent van Gogh's famous painting, "Starry Night." The swirling blues and yellows are just like the colors in the original work. It's like having a piece of art in your hand every time you write! Plus, the pen is adorned with a blend of blue and yellow crystals, adding a touch of sparkle and elegance. The gold hardware makes it luxurious, and it has a dark blue crystal on top. Whether you're a lover of art, writing, or both, this pen is the perfect addition to your collection. It's truly a pen that's as beautiful as it is functional.

pens.name: Sunflowers
pens.description: In a field where sunflowers sway, Van Gogh painted colors that play. A brushstroke of gold, a canvas so grand, Turned into a pen, right from his hand. But when it scribbled, to everyone's glee, The sunflowers danced, wild and free!"Art in motion!" the pen would boast,"Writing with petals, more than most!"

pens.name: Van Gogh's Letters
pens.description: In letters to Theo, tender and true, A pen in shades of brown and blue, Wrote tales of fields and skies so gray, Of starry nights and wistful day. It whispered secrets of the heart, Where words alone became the art. One dusk, it drew a simple line, Two brothers' bond, serene, divine, Their stories etched in time.

pens.name: Starlight
pens.description: Starlight is a beautiful addition to the Van Gogh Collection. This writing instrument is inspired by the color palette used by Vincent Van Gogh. Starlight has a titanium-colored chrome barrel and a blend of gray, pale green, and yellow crystals, with a pale green gem on top. It's like having a piece of art in your hand every time you write!

pens.name: Marché aux Fleurs
pens.description: March aux Fleurs, a Parisian dream, Where blooms and stories gently gleam. The pen wrote love notes, oh so sweet, In a flower shop on a quaint street. But with a flourish, roses took flight, Becoming bouquets that danced in the night!"Bonjour," it laughed, with petals so grand,"In this shop, magic's close at hand!"

pens.name: Jingle Bells
pens.description: Ring in the holiday season with Jingle Bells - the crystal pen that's as festive as Santa's sleigh. Its brushed metal barrel is smooth and shiny like a brand new ornament. The clear crystals falling into shades of red are little snowflakes, and that crystal clear gem on top? It's like a star shining bright in the winter sky. Whether you're signing Christmas cards or making your list and checking it twice, Jingle Bells is the perfect pen to add a touch of holiday magic to your writing.

pens.name: Tinsel
pens.description: Tinsel has a brushed metal barrel with a glass-like finish, blended clear, gray, and topaz crystals, and a mirrored gold gem on top.

pens.name: Winter Wonderland II
pens.description: Winter Wonderland is a pen so cool it can make a snowman shiver! With its brushed metal barrel and glass-like finish, this pen is so sleek it could slide down a snowbank. The clear crystals falling into shades of dark blue are like snowflakes falling into your hand. Writing with this pen is like ice skating in Rockefeller Center, it's smooth, effortless, and full of wonder. So grab a cup of hot cocoa, get cozy by the fire, and let Winter Wonderland - the crystal pen that's always ready to make your writing cool and crisp - whisk you away to a winter wonderland.

pens.name: Candy Corn
pens.description: Candy Corn has a glossy orange enamel barrel with stacked orange, yellow, and clear crystals, with an orange gem on top.

pens.name: Afterlife
pens.description: Enter a world beyond with the Afterlife - the pen that's hauntingly beautiful. With a velvet barrel with a print of a ghostly figure, this pen is sure to send shivers down your spine. And those gray and black crystals? They're tiny drops of fog, swirling in the misty air. That matching gray gem on top is like a beacon in the dark - a guide to the other side. Writing with this pen is like communicating with the spirit world - it's eerie, but captivating. So whether you're writing spooky stories or just enjoying the thrill of the unknown, Afterlife is the perfect pen to help you take a walk on the other side.

pens.name: Distortion
pens.description: Distortion is the crystal pen that's as mysterious as a ghost story. The gray geometric print has a subtle shift in the design that'll send a shiver down your spine. The blend of gray and black crystals adds an eerie touch, and the satin black chrome hardware and the matching gray gem on top only add to its enigmatic charm. Writing with this pen is like weaving your own ghostly tale - intriguing and full of suspense. Distortion is the perfect pen to unleash your inner ghost story and make your writing unforgettable.

pens.name: Drop Dead Gorgeous
pens.description: Drop Dead Gorgeous has a shimmering black enamel barrel, a blend of orange, green, black, and purple crystals, and a black gem on top.

pens.name: Sleepwalker
pens.description: Sleepwalker is not your average pen - it's the stuff of spooky stories and eerie dreams. This pen is part of the Ghost Story collection, and it's easy to see why. The velvet gray barrel, black chrome hardware, and black crystals make it feel like something out of a mystery novel. But don't worry, the clear aurora crystals add a touch of light to balance out the darkness. And the matching gray gem on top? It's the perfect finishing touch to this mysterious pen. Whether you're jotting down your wildest dreams or your darkest fears, Sleepwalker is the pen to do it with.

pens.name: Beach Please
pens.description: Beach Please has a rose gold chrome barrel with an ombre blend of teal and blue crystals.

pens.name: Make Waves
pens.description: Dive into the ocean of creativity with Make Waves, the perfect pen for any mermaid wannabe. The printed enamel barrel has textured waves that will have you daydreaming of sun, sand, and surf. With a blend of teal and blue crystals, it looks like a piece of treasure that you might find washed up on the shore. And let's not forget about the little mermaid gem on top that will have you channeling your inner mermaid and make some serious waves with your writing.

pens.name: Sandy Toes
pens.description: Say hello to your new beachside companion - Sandy Toes, the perfect pen to accompany you on your next seaside adventure! With its printed enamel barrel featuring stunning teal waves crashing onto a golden sandy shore, this pen will transport you to your happy place with just one glance. The blend of sparkling teal and blue crystals inside the chamber and a matching teal gem on top add a touch of glam to this ocean-inspired writing tool. Part of the Making Waves collection, Sandy Toes is perfect for all mermaids and beach lovers alike. So grab your sunscreen, your favorite floppy hat, and let's go make some waves!

pens.name: Siren Song
pens.description: You won't be able to resist the call of the Siren Song crystal pen. The printed enamel barrel features a beautiful mermaid silhouette on a metallic ombre teal and purple background. And to make things even more enchanting, there's a blend of teal and purple crystals inside. It's the perfect pen to capture your dreams, plan your next adventure, or just add some magic to your everyday writing. So dive in, mermaid lovers, and let Siren Song take you on a journey!

pens.name: Swim Team
pens.description: Dive into the deep end of style with the Swim Team crystal pen! This beauty boasts a rose gold engraved metallic enamel barrel with a mesmerizing mermaid scale pattern over an ombre in shades of purple and teal. The chamber holds a blend of blue and teal crystals that shimmer like sunlight on the water's surface. Finished off with sleek rose gold hardware and a coordinating gem on top, this pen is the perfect accessory for any mermaid at heart. Ideal for jotting down notes, signing papers, or doodling sea creatures, the Swim Team pen is sure to make a splash in your collection.

pens.name: Sirena
pens.description: Sirena has rainbow chrome barrel with a blend of purple, teal, and peach crystals, with an aurora gem on top.

pens.name: Mint Chocolate Chip
pens.description: Mint Chocolate Chip has a sparkling mint green barrel with mint opal crystals and dark brown crystals, topped with a dark brown gem on top.

pens.name: All Aboard
pens.description: Sail away in style. Our All Aboard pen features a white enamel barrel with navy blue nautical stripes, dark blue crystals, gold hardware, and a dark blue gem on the top.

pens.name: Deep Blue Sea
pens.description: Dive deep into your thoughts with Deep Blue Sea. This pen has blue octopus tentacles printed on an ombre enamel barrel, crystals in blue shades, with gold hardware, and a light blue gem on top.

pens.name: Seas the Day
pens.description: Seahorses, starfish and seashells dance on Seas the Day. It has a blend of clear, yellow, red, and blue crystals and gold hardware, with a yellow gem on top.

pens.name: Yacht Party
pens.description: Yacht Party has a navy blue enamel barrel with a blend of clear, yellow, red, and blue crystals, with a yellow gem on top. VIP Black Exclusive

pens.name: Impossible Things
pens.description: Prepare to fall down the rabbit hole of stylish writing with Impossible Things - the pen that proves nothing is impossible, especially when it comes to creating a statement piece for your desk. Inspired by the whimsical world of Alice's Adventures in Wonderland, this pen features a harlequin print on the barrel and a quote from the Queen that'll have you believing six impossible things before breakfast (and looking good doing it!). But the real magic is in the details - the cream and gray crystals that add a touch of sparkle to your writing, and the titanium hardware that screams "I'm too cool for ordinary pens." And let's not forget the gray gem on top, a symbol of the impossible made possible. With Impossible Things in your hand, you'll channel your inner Alice, and let this pen take you on a journey to your most creative writing yet.

pens.name: Looking Glass
pens.description: Looking Glass has titanium chrome with a blend of gray, clear, cream, and red crystals, with a dark red gem on top.

pens.name: Paint the Roses
pens.description: Whether you're a big fan of Alice in Wonderland or simply love roses, this pen is perfect for you! Paint the Roses features a print of painted roses on a cream and white ombre barrel, with titanium hardware and a dark red gem on top. The ombre crystals give it a subtle and sophisticated look, while the smooth writing experience is perfect for those who love to journal or write creatively.

pens.name: The Royal Herald
pens.description: The Royal Herald pen is fit for a queen. Or, at the very least, a very stylish writer. This pen is inspired by Alice's Adventures in Wonderland, and features the white rabbit embossed on the barrel. The beautifully blended crystals are reminiscent of red and white roses, with a dark red gem on the top. The titanium hardware adds a touch of luxury, making this pen a true work of art.

pens.name: Old Glory
pens.description: Old Glory has a blend of clear and red petite glass crystals, with stars printed on a navy blue barrel, silver hardware, and a red gem on top. You can purchase the pen alone, or bundle the pen with the Pippin Flag pin. pens.name: Raindrops Keep Falling
pens.description: Raindrops Keep Falling has an ombre barrel from light gray to soft blue, with a raised raindrop texture designed to look like raindrops on a windowpane. The crystals are a blend of blues, aurora, and grays, with a gray gem on top. This pen is a VIP Exclusive.

pens.name: Hippity Hoppity
pens.description: Limited Edition Hippity Hoppity is a fun pastel pen to hop into spring. It has a mint enamel barrel with stacked pink, purple, blue, and yellow crystals and a pink gem on top. Release date April 8th, 2022

pens.name: Sakura

pens.name: High Maintenance
pens.description: With a black enamel barrel and a pink quatrefoil print fit for a queen, High Maintenance is the perfect crystal pen for those who are, well, high maintenance (but in the best way possible). Inside, you'll find a blend of pink, gray, and clear crystals that add the perfect pop of bling to your writing. And let's not forget the light pink gem on top, a tiny but mighty detail that adds a touch of glam to this pen. Whether you're signing contracts or scribbling in your journal, High Maintenance is the pen that will make your words shine brighter than your diamonds. So go ahead, embrace your inner diva, and let High Maintenance be the perfect companion that's as fabulous and fierce as you are!

pens.name: Merry and Bright
pens.description: Merry and Bright has a blend of green and red crystals on a metallic bright green barrel with a matching green gem on top. It's that time of year again! The merriest time of the year is here and you need the perfect pen to keep track of all your holiday plans. This festive pen features sparkling red and green crystals, goldtone hardware, and a green gem on top. The Merry and Bright pen is the perfect gift for everyone on your list.

pens.name: Clara Marie
pens.description: A wooden soldier, proud and tall, Danced at the Christmas festival's call. Clara watched in pure delight, As he twirled with all his might. But in this fantasy night so grand, He bowed and offered his hand."My dear Clara, won't you see,'Tis no nutcracker, but your sweet beau, me!

pens.name: Pas de Deux
pens.description: In a theater grand, with curtains of red, A ballerina danced, light as a thread. Her pen, like a wand, wrote tales of delight, In letters that twirled through the night. But as she spun in her final grand jeté, The ink turned to snowflakes, in a magical display."Pas de deux," she laughed, "with a frosty twist, A Nutcracker's dream, too sweet to resist!"

pens.name: The Mouse King
pens.description: Looking for a pen with character? Look no further than The Mouse King! This greyombre beauty boasts gold hardware and petite glass crystals, and features an engraved Mouse King dancer for an extra touch of elegance. Perfect for jotting down your battle plans against the Nutcracker Prince! Get ready to dance into the night with The Mouse King pen from our Nutcracker Ballet collection

pens.name: The Nutcracker

This red ombre barrel is like a cherry on top of your desk, and the Nutcracker doll engraving in gold is a charming touch that will make you smile every time you use it. With petite glass crystals that sparkle like the snow, and gold hardware that adds a touch of elegance, this pen is a must-have for any ballet lover or Nutcracker enthusiast. Whether you're writing down your own sugar plum dreams or just scribbling a to-do list, this pen will make every moment feel magical.

pens.name: Waltz of the Snowflakes
pens.description: Get ready to take the stage the Waltz of the Snowflakes crystal pen! With its blue ombre barrel and gold hardware, this pen is as elegant and graceful as a ballerina. The petite glass crystals are like a flurry of snowflakes, and the gold hardware adds a touch of warmth to the cool winter scene. As part of the Nutcracker Collection, this pen is the perfect way to add a touch of whimsy to your writing. So grab your tutu and get ready to dance with the Waltz of the Snowflakes.

That matching gem on top is like a tiny little crown - proof that you're the queen (or king) of your own ant hill. Writing with this pen is like leading your own parade - it's silly, but oh so satisfying. So whether you're doodling during a boring meeting or just looking for a pen with some personality, the Antsy Pantsy is the perfect pen to help you embrace your inner antsy pants.

pens.name: Alliance for Lupus Research | Sparkle for a Cause
pens.description: $5030.10 raised of $5000 goal as of July 1, 2016. 100% of the sales of this Sparkle for a Cause PenGem will be donated to the Alliance for Lupus Research. The PenGem features an dark purple enameled barrel topped with violet and white diamond rhinestones. Lupus is one of many disorders of the immune system known as autoimmune diseases. In autoimmune diseases, the immune system turns against parts of the body it is designed to protect. This leads to inflammation and damage to various body tissues. Lupus can affect many parts of the body, including the joints, skin, kidneys, heart, lungs, blood vessels, and brain. Although people with the disease may have many different symptoms, some of the most common ones include extreme fatigue, painful or swollen joints (arthritis), unexplained fever, skin rashes, and kidney problems. At present, there is no cure for lupus. However, lupus can be effectively treated with drugs, and most people with the disease can lead active, healthy lives. Lupus is characterized by periods of illness, called flares, and periods of wellness, or remission. Understanding how to prevent flares and how to treat them when they do occur helps people with lupus maintain better health. Intense research is underway, and scientists funded by the NIH are continuing to make great strides in understanding the disease, which may ultimately lead to a cure. The Alliance for Lupus Research (ALR) is a national voluntary health organization based in New York City that was founded in 1999 and is chaired by Robert Wood Johnson IV, a member of the founding family of Johnson & Johnson. By committing millions of dollars to significant lupus research every year and holding nationwide lupus walks to secure additional funding, the ALR is proactively battling lupus. To learn more, please visit www.lupusresearch.org.

pens.name: Sjögren's Syndrome Foundation
pens.description: 100% of the sales of this Sparkle for a Cause PenGem will be donated to the Sjögren's Syndrome Foundation. This PenGem features a dark blue enamel barrel topped with blue sapphire and white diamond crystal rhinestones. Sjögren's (SHOW-grins) is a chronic autoimmune disease in which an individual's white blood cells attack their moisture-producing glands. It is the 2nd most prevalent rheumatic autoimmune disease striking as many as four million Americans. This makes it three times more common than better known related diseases such as Lupus and Multiple Sclerosis. Sjögren's affects the entire body. Along with symptoms of extensive dryness, other serious complications include profound fatigue, chronic pain, major organ involvement, neuropathies and lymphomas with some patients experiencing debilitating symptoms that greatly impair their functioning and quality of life. Unfortunately, Sjögren's remains relatively unknown and is often undiagnosed or misdiagnosed with the average time from onset of symptoms to diagnosis being 3.5 years. Founded in 1983, the Sjögren's Syndrome Foundation (SSF) is the only national non-profit dedicated to fighting Sjögren's and improving the lives of those living with the disease. The SSF's mission is to educate patients and their families about Sjögren's, increase public and professional awareness of Sjögren's and encourage research into new treatments and a cure. To learn more, please visit www. Sjogrens.org. Release date April 18, 2016

So whether you're taking notes during a mission briefing or just dreaming about flying high, the Call Sign is the perfect pen to help you feel like a true ace.

pens.name: Cherries and Cream
pens.description: In a field where red cherries sway, A dollop of cream came to play. They danced in the sun, Their flavors as one, A treat that could sweeten your day!

pens.name: Creamsicle
pens.description: Creamsicle has a glossy cream enamel barrel with a blend of crystals in orange and cream.

pens.name: Daffodils
pens.description: In a garden full of springtime thrills, Bloomed a pen adorned with daffodils. Yellow petals, bright and gay, Chased the winter blues away. But as it wrote with graceful ease, It whispered secrets to the breeze. Who knew a pen with floral flair, Could make your words dance on air? FEATURED ON INSTAGRAM

pens.name: Elf on the Shelf
pens.description: An elf on a pen went on a lark, Scribbling notes after dark. He wrote Christmas wishes galore, Then hid them behind the front door. But Santa, quite clever and sly, Caught the elf's notes with his eye. He chuckled, "You'll see on Christmas Eve, What magic an elf's pen can weave!"

pens.name: Enchanted
pens.description: The Enchanted pen is perfect for someone who wants an elegant writing pen but prefers something sleek and simple. This pen shows off the gleaming appeal of silver on its satin enameled barrel, point, clip and top. The crystals inside the acrylic tube and the rhinestone at the top show off the fire and sparkle of white diamonds to give this pen an unmistakable air of luxury. This pen is sure to turn heads when you sign checks, forms or documents, and it makes a lovely gift for any occasion

pens.name: Femme Fatale
pens.description: Behold, the Femme Fatale pen, a writing tool so fierce and fabulous that it will make all your words sizzle! The barrel is adorned in a lace and rose print that's as stylish as it is sophisticated. Femme Fatale also features a sparkling blend of pink, gray, and clear crystals that will catch the light and make your words shine like the diamonds they are. And let's not forget the pièce de résistance - a black diamond gem on top that will make you feel like a total boss every time you use it. So if you want to add a touch of glamour to your writing routine, Femme Fatale is the way to go. It's the perfect combination of style, sass, and sophistication - just like you.

pens.name: Flightline
pens.description: Introducing Flightline - the crystal pen that's as inspiring as the Air Force itself. With a sparkling blue enamel barrel and a blend of blue crystals that match the sky, this pen captures the essence of aviation. And that matching blue gem on top? It's like a guiding star, leading you to the horizon. Plus, with the Air Force logo printed on the barrel, you can show off your pride and support for the brave men and women who serve our country. Whether you're a fan of the United States Air Force or just love the inspiring design, the PenGems Flightline is officially licensed and ready to take flight. Take notes during a briefing or just dream about your next adventure with Flightline.

pens.name: Florally Obliged
pens.description: Tidy little flowers, soft pink and neat. This pen says "I RSVP'd" with a front row seat. Polite on the outside, sure, that's true. But it definitely gossips like you do.

pens.name: Fusion Black Diamond Exclusive Crystal Pen
Holly Berry
pens.description: Get ready to jingle all the way with Holly Berry, the crystal pen that's more festive than a sleigh ride through a winter wonderland! Wrapped in a jolly holly design, this pen is your personal elf for all things merry and bright. Its chamber is a kaleidoscope of green and ruby crystals, reminiscent of the season's beloved evergreens and cheerful berries. Topped with a ruby gem that would make Santa's suit jealous, and finished with gold hardware that's as jolly as jingle bells, Holly Berry is the life of the holiday party. Scribbling with this gem is like sending your words on a holiday light tour, with every flourish adding a sparkle to your season's greetings. Holly Berry doesn't just help you write, it turns every list, note, and letter into a holiday spectacular!

pens.name: Icicle
pens.description: Icicle has a frosted satin finish with blend of pastel crystals and an aurora gem on top.

pens.name: Irises
pens.description: An iris stood tall, its petals in bloom, Filling the air with a soft perfume. It waved to a tulip, bold and bright, And said, "Join me for tea, come night!"But the tulip giggled and shook its head,"I close up at dusk, I'm off to bed!"So the iris danced solo instead.

pens.name: Magnolias
pens.description: Magnolias bloomed in pure delight, Their petals whispered in the night. A pen captured the blossoms' grace, Turning words into a fragrant embrace. But with a giggle, petals took flight, Becoming butterflies in the moonlight."Write with magic," the pen did say,"And watch your worries float away!"

pens.name: Merci, Paris
pens.description: A blend of crystals in soft shades of lavender, periwinkle, and gray on a lilac metallic barrel, topped with an iridescent lavender and blue aurora crystal and finished with silver hardware.

pens.name: Mocha Motion
pens.description: Smooth as cream in a slow-poured stream, This pen writes like a sepia dream. With soft swirl art and a mocha tone, It's giving café poet... working from home.

pens.name: National Breast Cancer Foundation 2016
pens.description: 100% of the proceeds of this Sparkle for a Cause pen will be donated to the National Breast Cancer Foundation. Read more about this wonderful organization on our blog. This pen has sold out, and you've raised $5000 for the National Breast Cancer Foundation! This limited edition pen features a light pink enameled barrel topped with clear crystals and a light rose Preciosa crystal on top. Ink Color: Black Point Type: Medium Point Size: 0.7 mm Size: 5 5/8" long and 3/8" wide Weight: 1/2 ounce Pocket Clip: Yes All pens come with smooth black ink. The ballpoint ink cartridge is replaceable, and we'll send an extra standard ballpoint ink refill with each pen.

pens.name: Neopolitan
pens.description: Neopolitan has a sparkling chocolate barrel with a stack of cream and rose cream opal crystals, topped with a cherry red gem on top.

pens.name: New Wave | VIP Exclusive
pens.description: New Wave is white with an ombre of yellows, pinks, and blues, with black hardware, and a matching aurora gem on top. This pen is a VIP Exclusive. Thank you for being a VIP member!

pens.name: Overboard
pens.description: Overboard has a metallic gray enamel barrel with a blend of gray and blood-red crystals with a matching gem on top.

pens.name: Poinsettia Rosetta
pens.description: Step into the holiday spirit with Poinsettia Rosetta, the pen that's more festive than your favorite ugly Christmas sweater! Swirling with a bouquet of red and green crystals in its chamber, this gem captures the merry twinkle of holiday lights. Its barrel blooms with two handcrafted poinsettias, as vivid and cheerful as the ones decking your halls. Crowned with a lustrous red gem, this pen is the monarch of merriment, while the glint of gold hardware adds a dash of Yuletide luxury. Whether jotting down your Christmas list or penning a season's greeting, Poinsettia Rosetta turns every word into a celebration. It's not just a pen-it's a holiday cheerleader, urging you to dash through the snow of your paper with a jolly "Ho, ho, ho!"

pens.name: Polaris
pens.description: Polaris has a matte black chrome barrel with a blend of black and clear and gray crystals and a gray gem on top.

pens.name: Port Decisions
pens.description: In a vineyard where grapevines entwine, Stood a pen that decided to shine,"I make pour decisions," it said, As it painted the town red, With each stroke, a sip of fine wine.

pens.name: Punkin Pie | Limited Edition
pens.description: Limited Edition Pumpkin spice and everything nice. This deep shade of orange is the perfect compliment to sweater weather. Each pen comes with black ink with a standard medium ballpoint cartridge. We'll also send an extra standard cartridge for every pen.

pens.name: San Giorgio Maggiore
pens.description: The sunset spilled fire across the sea, A painter's dream in its purity. San Giorgio rose, a silhouette fair, A quiet reverence filled the air.

pens.name: Santa Fe
pens.description: With desert gold, turquoise crystals, and a pattern that feels like sun-warmed adobe, Santa Fe writes with soul and a little bit of wanderlust.

pens.name: Silverleaf
pens.description: Silverleaf is your calm little reset button in pen form. Pale green, eucalyptus soft, and filled with pastel crystals that make even a grocery list feel like you've got your life together.

pens.name: Sirius
pens.description: Sirius has a matte black chrome barrel with a blend of black and purple crystals and a purple gem on top.

pens.name: Sparkling Isolation
pens.description: Free with purchase of $35 or more. Add to cart and use code STAYHOME at checkout. A warm and sparkling purple enamel with a blend of peach petite glass aurora crystals, and an aurora gem on top. Not valid with any other offers or discount codes. There is a limit of one per person. You must add this item to your cart before checkout, it is not automatic. Each pen comes with black ink with a standard medium ballpoint cartridge. We'll also send an extra standard cartridge for every pen.

pens.name: Sugared Almond
pens.description: Once upon a sugary spree, An almond danced under a tree. With a sprinkle of magic, sweet and neat, It turned into a pen, oh what a treat! But when it wrote, with sugary flair, It penned candy dreams floating in the air."Oh nuts!" it exclaimed with a jittery cheer,"These words taste like candy, my dear!"

pens.name: Tall Tale
pens.description: Tall Tale has a red and black buffalo plaid pattern on the barrel with black crystals and a black gem on top.

pens.name: Tall Tale | Gold
pens.description: Tall Tale has a red and black buffalo plaid pattern on the barrel with clear crystals and a red gem on top. It is part of the Tall Tale collection.

pens.name: the1407planners IV
pens.description: The fourth designer pen from the1407planners! It has a smoky gray metallic barrel topped with a blend of crystals in frozen berry colors with a purple gem on top and silver hardware.

pens.name: Thorn to Be Wild
pens.description: Red roses twist with confident gold, Mischief and secrets daringly bold. Charming, dramatic, perfectly sly, The pen that winks as you pass by.

pens.name: To Brie or Not to Brie
pens.description: To Brie or Not to Brie, there's no question you'll love this crystal pen! It's a gorgeous cream color and has this amazing blend of honey and vanilla crystals that shine like crazy. The gold hardware and ivory gem on top give it a really elegant touch. It's the perfect pen for when you want to add a little sophistication to your writing. Plus, it's refillable so you can use it for years to come. And the name is just so pun-tastic, it's sure to make you smile every time you use it.

pens.name: Tulips
pens.description: Tulips stood tall in a row, Debating which way the wind would blow. One said, "Left!" The other said, "Right!"So they swayed and wobbled all through the night. But come sunrise, what a sight-They'd tangled themselves up tight. FEATURED ON INSTAGRAM

pens.name: Under the Mistletoe
pens.description: Say hello to Under the Mistletoe, the crystal pen that's all about sneaking in that cheeky holiday charm between the lines! It's twined with a mischievous mistletoe design, complete with playful white berries that dare you to write with a wink. The crystal chamber-a delightful party of green and clear crystals-shimmers like a laugh shared over eggnog. Capped with a green gem that's as zesty as a holiday punch, and paired with silver hardware that's got more twinkle than your favorite festive lights, this pen is ready to swing into the season. Under the Mistletoe is not just any pen; it's your excuse to doodle beneath the boughs, turning notes into notes-to-self about the joy of writing and the fun of the holidays. Go on, give your words a little nudge - after all, 'tis the season to be jolly (and a little bit cheeky)!

pens.name: Vega
pens.description: Vega has a matte black chrome barrel with a blend of black and teal crystals and a teal gem on top.
